title: RapidAPI API Listing
description: Schema representing an API listing on the RapidAPI platform, including metadata, versioning, endpoint definitions, and pricing plans.

id.description: Unique identifier for the API listing on the platform

name.description: Display name of the API as shown on the marketplace

slug.description: URL-friendly slug used in the API's marketplace URL

description.description: Short description of the API displayed on the endpoints tab

longDescription.description: Detailed description with use cases and documentation, displayed on the about tab

category.description: The category the API is listed under for organization and discovery

tags.description: Custom tags applied to the API for filtering and search

websiteUrl.description: URL to the website providing the API, shown on the about tab

imageUrl.description: URL to the API icon image, recommended 500x500 px in PNG or JPG format

status.description: Current publication status of the API listing

isVerified.description: Whether the API provider has been verified by RapidAPI

provider.description: Information about the organization or user providing the API

endpoints.description: Endpoint definitions for the current active version

plans.description: Subscription pricing plans available for this API

averageRating.description: Average user rating on a scale of 0 to 5

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the API listing was first created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the API listing was last modified

id.description: Unique identifier for the API provider

name.description: Display name of the API provider

organizationId.description: Organization the provider belongs to, if applicable

isVerified.description: Whether the provider has been verified

Provider.description: Information about an API provider on the platform

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the version was created

ApiVersion.description: A version of an API listing

description.description: Description of what the endpoint does

ApiEndpoint.description: An individual endpoint within an API

location.description: Where the parameter is sent in the request

EndpointParameter.description: A parameter accepted by an API endpoint

name.description: Plan name such as Basic, Pro, or Ultra

price.description: Monthly price in USD, 0 for free tier

rateLimit.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per month

quotaType.description: Whether exceeding the limit blocks requests or incurs overage charges

PricingPlan.description: A subscription pricing plan for an API
